titleStmt.title: SII 24.244: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 244. (A.R. No. 36 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL OPPOSITE THE CHANDRA-PUSHKARAṆI.

summary.p: Records the remittance into the temple treasury by Śrīvaikundadāsaṉ a sum of 2,200 paṇam, part of which was realised as cost of lands in Jagadēkavīra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam sold to certain bhaṭṭas of Ravivarma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, part towards temple services and the rest by way of fines collected from the Āriyar and the Kaikkōḷas. The amount so remitted was earmarked towards the purchase of a palanquin, an aureole, etc. for the temple.

The record is dated in the 4th year, Āḍi 10, of Māṟavarmaṉ Tribhuvanachakravartin Kulaśēkharadēva who may be identical with Kulaśēkhara II of the previous numbers. The date may correspond to A.D. 1317, July 7.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koṉarayavarmmar tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu Āṭi mātam 10 tiyati nāḷ koyil Akaram Iravivarmmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭar kaḷukku
tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil śrī vaikuntatātareṉ paṟṟumuṟi kuṭutta paricāvatu . Ivvakara nattattukku vāstu śeṣattukkum tavarācaṉ paṭukaikkum vilaiyāka niccayittu tirukkoṭṭakārattil
Oṭukkuvatāna paṇam 2 1000 2 100 Ippaṇam Iraṇṭāyirattiru nūṟṟukkum paṟṟiṉa tirup paṇikku piṟitta paṇattil paṟṟiṉa Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu tai mātam 2 10 9- m tiyati tirupperil piṟi
ttut tantu paṟṟiṉa paṇam 2 100- m tirumuṟṟappaṟṟu jagadecavira caturveti maṅkalattu paṟṟiṉa paṇam 8 100 2 10 9- m Ākap paṇam Āyirattirupattoṉpatum Āṉi mātam Iraṇṭāntiyati Ā
riyarait teṇṭam niccayitta paṇattil paṟṟiṉa paṇam 1000 100 3 10 kaikkoḷar perāl teṇṭam niccayitta paṇattil kulacekaratātar tantu paṟṟiṉa paṇam 4 10 1- m Āka paṇam 1000 100 7 10 1 Āka paṇam 2 1000 2 100
Ippaṇam Iraṇṭāyirattu Irunūṟum Ippaṭikaḷāl paṟṟik koṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatil Etirāmāṇṭu cittirai mātam Eḻāntiyati nāḷ tiruccivikaikkum tiruvācikaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyiṟṟukku nāṉ
poṟpaṇṭārattil Oṭukkiṉa poṉṉile Ivvāṭṭai mārkaḻi mātam 10 3 tiyati piṟittu kuṭuttuSpace not engraved.
paṟṟumuṟi kuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭarkaḷukku śrī vaikuṉtatātareṉ . Ippaṇam poṟ paṇṭārattile mutaliṭṭu kuṭuttamaikku §One line is hidden by a masonry drain: read in situ.
Digital edition of SII 24.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
